children.heading: Use of Commodity Credit Corporation
children.label: a Use of Commodity Credit Corporation
children.text: The Secretary shall use the funds, facilities, and authorities of the Commodity Credit Corporation to carry out this chapter.

children.heading: Determinations by Secretary
children.label: b Determinations by Secretary
children.text: A determination made by the Secretary under this chapter shall be final and conclusive.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the Secretary and the Commodity Credit Corporation, as appropriate, shall promulgate such regulations as are necessary to implement this chapter.May 13, 2002

children.label: A
children.text: chapter 35 of title 44 (commonly know as the “Paperwork Reduction Act”);1So in original. Probably should be “known”.1

children.label: B
children.text: the Statement of Policy of the Secretary of Agriculture effective (36 Fed. Reg. 13804), relating to notices of proposed rulemaking and public participation in rulemaking; andJuly 24, 1971

children.label: C
children.text: the notice and comment provisions of .section 553 of title 5

children.heading: Congressional review of agency rulemaking
children.label: 3 Congressional review of agency rulemaking
children.text: In carrying out this subsection, the Secretary shall use the authority provided under .section 808 of title 5

children.heading: Treatment of advance payment option
children.label: d Treatment of advance payment option

children.text: the advance payment of direct payments and counter-cyclical payments under subchapter I and subchapter III;
the single payment of compensation for eligible peanut quota holders under ; andsection 7960 of this title
the advance payment of direct payments and counter-cyclical payments under title I of the Food, Conservation, and Energy Act of 2008 [ et seq.].7 U.S.C. 8701

children.heading: Adjustment authority related to Uruguay Round compliance
children.label: e Adjustment authority related to Uruguay Round compliance

children.heading: Required determination; adjustment
children.label: 1 Required determination; adjustment
children.text: If the Secretary determines that expenditures under subchapters I through V that are subject to the total allowable domestic support levels under the Uruguay Round Agreements (as defined in ), as in effect on , will exceed such allowable levels for any applicable reporting period, the Secretary shall, to the maximum extent practicable, make adjustments in the amount of such expenditures during that period to ensure that such expenditures do not exceed such allowable levels.section 3501 of title 19May 13, 2002

children.heading: Congressional notification
children.label: 2 Congressional notification
children.text: Before making any adjustment under paragraph (1), the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate and the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives a report describing the determination made under that paragraph and the extent of the adjustment to be made.
